results.title: Nice weight but not long enough
results.reviewText: I love the weight of the Sculpt Tank Top and the color. However, it's not long enough so that when I am teaching and raise up my arms to the sky it rides up. I wish it were a few inches longer. If I go to a larger size the arm holes are too big for me. Wish you made a version for those of us who are tall.

luluResponse.responseText: We hear you on wanting to see a longer version in this style—thanks for putting it on our radar.

results.title: My 8th sculpt tank and might be my last.
results.reviewText: The material is getting thinner every year. Last year was rubbery and this year it’s thinner than last year. I prefer the sculpt tank I bought before Covid. I understand that most brands are delivering thinner material but this cycle is dragging longer.

results.title: Previous versions are better
results.reviewText: I like the fit except for the neckline, way too tight. Prefer previous versions of this shirt. Wish lulu would make more shirts that are loose fitting. Returned item due to neckline

luluResponse.responseText: We hear your thoughts regarding the neckline fitting too tight, and we appreciate you sharing this feedback with us. We're always looking for ways to innovate our gear, and your feedback helps us in the process.

results.title: Great when the fit is consistent
results.reviewText: I'm giving this three stars because of the inconsistency of the fit. I love these tanks but I'm frustrated with the fact that I own five of these in the same size (6) and they all fit differently. This one is too tight across the bust, I have another that has the longest, saggiest armholes. It's just up in the air if it's going to fit.

luluResponse.responseText: We hear your thoughts about the Sculpt Tank Top having inconsistent sizing, and that's not the experience we aim for. Please know, we truly appreciate you sharing this feedback with us.

results.title: Too large, low armholes
results.reviewText: Beautiful fabric, beautiful design. I ordered a 12 (my usual size) and it was too big; the arm holes were half was down my torso. I returned it to the store and tried on a 10 which was still too big.

luluResponse.responseText: We're glad you loved the look and feel of the Sculpt Tank Top, though we understand the fit didn't quite work out this time. If you'd like, our Product Experts can help with size guidance or recommend a similar tank with a closer fit—connect anytime by visiting the 'Contact Us' page via our website.
Thanks for sharing your thoughts—your feedback is important to us. To continue the conversation about your recent purchase of the Sculpt Tank Top, send us a message at gec@lululemon.com.

results.title: Not what it used to be
results.reviewText: I’ve been a loyal sculpt tank fan for YEARS!!  I recently lost some weight and had to go down in size.  I was really surprised to see the difference in quality from my older tops compared to the newer ones.  The newer ones feel like the fabric is much lower in quality and thinner. The stitching isn’t as good either.  My older tops are still in amazing shape after several years of regular use. I wish they would go back to what they were using in the past.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for being such a loyal Sculpt Tank fan, we love hearing how your older pieces have been a staple for you over the years. We’re sorry to hear the recent version didn’t feel up to the same standard. Your feedback on fabric and construction is incredibly valuable, and we’ll be sure to pass it along to our design team as they continue to refine the tank.

results.title: What happened?
results.reviewText: I had 6 of these sculpt tanks already - all the same size 12. I love them so much and wear one almost every day. I ordered another one in a size 12 and didn’t even think but took off the tag, threw it on, and ran out the door to go for a walk. The entire time it kept riding up over my chest. It is definitely cut smaller and is now uncomfortable to wear. Please stop messing with sizing and designs that are already great as they are.

luluResponse.responseText: We hear your thoughts about the Sculpt Tank Top having inconsistent sizing, and that's not the experience we aim for. Please know, we truly appreciate you sharing this feedback with us. If you require any support with setting up an online return, you can reach out to us via Live Chat, or give us a call at 1.877.263.9300.

results.title: Great shirt, colours a challenge
results.reviewText: I love the tank top itself.  But the colours on the website are not necessarily right - the grape is really more bordeaux, for example.  I was disappointed.  That was the shirt I was asked to review.  The rest I love, but I wish there were more colours available for longer.  By the time I see them in my size, they're sold out (and I follow the email!)

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing your feedback with us. We're glad to hear you're loving the Sculpt Tank Top, and we hear your thoughts on colour accuracy and availability. We know it’s not ideal to miss out on a colour you’ve been keeping an eye on. For a first look at what’s coming, check out our TikTok channel on Mondays for a sneak peek at new product drops each week.

results.reviewText: I want to love this tank. It's long and comes in so many colors, but the cut isn't flattering with hips.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts on the Sculpt Tank Top. Our Product Experts are here to support you with finding a fit that works for you. Connect with them on our "Contact Us" page for further support.

results.title: Sculpt tank tops
results.reviewText: I love these tanks but I wish they made size 16 and made more of them because us bigger ladies like to wear these clothes too.  Plus bring back the sculpt pleated back.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing your thoughts on the Sculpt Tank Top. We appreciate your feedback regarding the sizing. While we strive to create an inclusive experience to all, we recognize there's always room for improvement. We value your input, as it plays a key role in our ongoing effort to elevate our gear. To be the first to know about new and updated styles, be sure to sign up for our product email notifications. You can enroll by heading to the bottom of our website and selecting ‘Email Sign Up’.

results.title: Would like to see more colours
results.reviewText: Like how light this top is

results.title: Not for outdoor running in Texas
results.reviewText: I got a couple of these for running outdoors in Texas, mostly because they were the only tanks that don’t suck to your body, and while they are very lightweight, they do not wick sweat very well. By the end of my run the shirt is absolutely drenched & sticks to my skin. I’d recommend them for less sweaty activities only.

luluResponse.responseText: Your feedback on the Sculpt Tank Top is valuable to us and we appreciate hearing where we can improve our gear for an overall better fit, feel, and guest experience.

results.title: Sculpt Tank Top Pleated
results.reviewText: Last year I purchased a Sculpt Tank that was pleated.  I love wearing it for travel and for sailing as it keeps me cool and comfortable. I love that it is an easy fit that floats away from my body. This spring I purchased two tops that I thought were the same style and fit, but without the pleats they pulled and did not drape nicely in the back. As a result, I returned them and was very disappointed that the sculpt tank with pleats no longer appears to be available.  Please bring back the great pleated version as they are a Lululemon one of a kind style!

results.title: Tan lines …
results.reviewText:
I ran for 2hrs at 7am and got the sun tan lines from the bra underneath this tank top :(

Feels good & comfortable, fresh, light, fits well, but has no UV protection and the sun will get your skin. So wear sunscreen all over your upper body, not just arms.

luluResponse.responseText: Your feedback is valuable to us, and we appreciate hearing about your experience and thoughts. This shows us where to improve our gear for better overall use and guest experience when running after your sweaty pursuits.

results.title: Love this but what happened to bigger sizes?
results.reviewText:
Been buying the Scuplt tank for years for my mom. She wears a 16. But all your sculpt tanks now only go to 14. And they use to go to size 18? 

Why did you guys take away size 16,18? Speaking for my mom, who is plus size, it is nice to have finally found a shirt that is stylish and fits nice for plus size women but then you take away the plus sizes? Please explain :) Will they be back?
